title: nepeta pungens
intro: Nepeta pungens, also known as catmint or white mint, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Nepeta pungens include soothing digestive issues, reducing stress and anxiety, and alleviating respiratory problems such as bronchitis and coughs. The herbal preparations of Nepeta pungens include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
